identification.raw_estimand:
Estimand type: EstimandType.NONPARAMETRIC_ATE

### Estimand : 1
Estimand name: backdoor
Estimand expression:
 d        
────(E[Y])
d[X]      
Estimand assumption 1, Unconfoundedness: If U→{X} and U→Y then P(Y|X,,U) = P(Y|X,)

### Estimand : 2
Estimand name: iv
No such variable(s) found!

### Estimand : 3
Estimand name: frontdoor
Estimand expression:
 ⎡    d         ∂            ⎤
E⎢─────────(Y)⋅────([M₁  M₂])⎥
 ⎣d[M₁  M₂]    ∂[X]          ⎦
Estimand assumption 1, Full-mediation: M1,M2 intercepts (blocks) all directed paths from X to Y.
Estimand assumption 2, First-stage-unconfoundedness: If U→{X} and U→{M1,M2} then P(M1,M2|X,U) = P(M1,M2|X)
Estimand assumption 3, Second-stage-unconfoundedness: If U→{M1,M2} and U→Y then P(Y|M1,M2, X, U) = P(Y|M1,M2, X)

### Estimand : 4
Estimand name: general_adjustment
Estimand expression:
 d        
────(E[Y])
d[X]      
Estimand assumption 1, Unconfoundedness: If U→{X} and U→Y then P(Y|X,,U) = P(Y|X,)

ett.observational_estimand: Sum[M1, M2](P(M1 | X) * P(M2 | X) * P(Y | M1, M2, X))

metadata.proposed_domain: Intensive Care Unit C. difficile Infection Epidemiology
metadata.ground_truth_refresh_scope: R2 identification, forbidden controls, R3 identifiability, outcome stats
